title: Cuneiform Tablet #0423: Neo-Babylonian Literary
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a literary document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a literary document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Literary document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records literary matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
